landing.title: Oye AI | Your AI Employee for WhatsApp
landing.meta_description: Automate your sales, book appointments, and support customers on WhatsApp with autonomous AI. Built for scalable businesses.
landing.hero_badge: ⚡ The New Era of Conversational Commerce
landing.hero_subtitle: Oye AI automates support, lead qualification, appointment booking, and payments 24/7 on WhatsApp, Instagram, and web chat. Native, fast, and premium.
landing.features_title: Everything you need to automate your business
landing.features_subtitle: Oye AI is not a generic chatbot. It's an autonomous sales and support assistant.
landing.feature_ai_desc: Instant replies in your customer's language, processing text and voice notes with human-like precision.
landing.feature_booking_desc: Sync calendars and book appointments automatically within the chat with zero friction.
landing.feature_payment_desc: Generate and send Stripe payment links directly to close sales instantly.
landing.feature_handoff_desc: Step in anytime. The AI detects customer intent and hands over control with real-time alerts.
